controls.control_id: Hijacked agent with excess privilege causes larger blast radius
controls.title: NHI-5 Over-Privileged NHI
controls.description: Scope all agent credentials to minimum required � least privilege enforced

controls.control_id: Long-lived tokens allow hijack to persist beyond session
controls.title: NHI-7 Long-Lived Credentials
controls.description: Short-lived credentials � tokens expire at task completion, no long-lived agent tokens

controls.control_id: Shared credentials allow hijacked agent to impersonate other agents
controls.title: NHI-9 NHI Reuse
controls.description: Unique identity per agent � no shared service accounts across agent deployments

controls.control_id: Agent with excess privilege can call tools in destructive ways even within normal use
controls.title: NHI-5 Over-Privileged NHI
controls.description: Per-tool permission manifests � each tool scoped to minimum required operations

controls.control_id: Compromised third-party tool identity gets full scope of agent credential
controls.title: NHI-3 Vulnerable Third-Party NHI
controls.description: Validate all third-party tool identities � reject tokens from unregistered issuers

controls.control_id: Single shared credential allows tool misuse to affect multiple services
controls.title: NHI-9 NHI Reuse
controls.description: Unique credential per tool integration � tool-scoped tokens, not agent-wide tokens

controls.control_id: Agent credentials not revoked on decommission � dormant tokens exploitable
controls.title: NHI-1 Improper Offboarding
controls.description: Formal agent offboarding � all credentials revoked, tokens invalidated, access removed

controls.control_id: Agent credentials exposed in memory, logs, tool payloads
controls.title: NHI-2 Secret Leakage
controls.description: No credentials in agent context, logs, or tool payloads � secret manager only

controls.control_id: Third-party tool credentials with excessive permissions inherited by agent
controls.title: NHI-3 Vulnerable Third-Party NHI
controls.description: Validate all third-party NHIs � revoke over-privileged third-party tokens

controls.control_id: Weak agent-to-system authentication � credential reuse or weak secrets
controls.title: NHI-4 Insecure Authentication
controls.description: Strong authentication for all agent-to-system connections � mTLS, short-lived tokens

controls.control_id: Agent holds more permissions than required � lateral movement amplifier
controls.title: NHI-5 Over-Privileged NHI
controls.description: Least privilege per agent role � scope enforced, reviewed quarterly

controls.control_id: Agent credentials stored in cleartext � config files, environment variables
controls.title: NHI-6 Insecure Credential Storage
controls.description: Secret manager for all agent credentials � no cleartext storage anywhere

controls.control_id: Agent tokens without expiry � compromise persists indefinitely
controls.title: NHI-7 Long-Lived Credentials
controls.description: Short-lived credentials � task-scoped tokens with automatic expiry

controls.control_id: Production agent credentials accessible in dev/test environments
controls.title: NHI-8 Environment Isolation Failure
controls.description: Strict environment isolation � separate credentials per environment, no cross-environment reuse

controls.control_id: Shared agent credential across multiple instances or deployments
controls.title: NHI-9 NHI Reuse
controls.description: Unique identity per agent deployment � no credential sharing

controls.control_id: Humans using agent service accounts � no attribution, no MFA
controls.title: NHI-10 Human Use of NHI
controls.description: Agent credentials machine-only � human use detected and blocked

controls.control_id: Compromised MCP server holds or can request excessive permissions
controls.title: NHI-3 Vulnerable Third-Party NHI
controls.description: Validate all third-party NHIs at connection � revoke tokens from unverified sources

controls.control_id: Malicious components extract credentials from agent memory or config
controls.title: NHI-6 Insecure Credential Storage
controls.description: Credential isolation � components cannot access other components' credentials

controls.control_id: Supply chain compromise introduces credential exfiltration code
controls.title: NHI-2 Secret Leakage
controls.description: Scan all agent components for credential access patterns before deployment

controls.control_id: Code executes in context of over-privileged agent credential � amplifies RCE impact
controls.title: NHI-5 Over-Privileged NHI
controls.description: Sandbox code execution under a separate, minimal credential � not the agent's primary identity

controls.control_id: Code execution in production context with prod credentials
controls.title: NHI-8 Environment Isolation Failure
controls.description: Strict environment isolation for code execution � dedicated sandboxed identity

controls.control_id: Shared credential means RCE in one agent affects all agents sharing the credential
controls.title: NHI-9 NHI Reuse
controls.description: Unique credential per agent � code execution in one instance cannot leverage other instances' access

controls.control_id: Memory store credentials leaked � attacker writes poisoned content directly
controls.title: NHI-2 Secret Leakage
controls.description: Scan all paths where memory store credentials could leak � logs, config, agent context

controls.control_id: Memory store credentials in cleartext � trivially extracted
controls.title: NHI-6 Insecure Credential Storage
controls.description: Secret manager for all memory store credentials � no cleartext anywhere

controls.control_id: Long-lived memory store credentials enable persistent access for attacker
controls.title: NHI-7 Long-Lived Credentials
controls.description: Short-lived credentials for memory store access � rotate on each agent session

controls.control_id: Weak or missing authentication on A2A channels � agent spoofing enabled
controls.title: NHI-4 Insecure Authentication
controls.description: Strong mutual authentication on all A2A channels � mTLS, certificate-based, short-lived

controls.control_id: Long-lived A2A tokens enable persistent replay attacks
controls.title: NHI-7 Long-Lived Credentials
controls.description: Short-lived A2A tokens with nonce-based replay protection

controls.control_id: Shared A2A credentials allow one compromised agent to impersonate others
controls.title: NHI-9 NHI Reuse
controls.description: Unique identity per agent � A2A authentication bound to specific agent identity

controls.control_id: Cascading agent failure with over-privileged credentials exposes all accessible systems
controls.title: NHI-5 Over-Privileged NHI
controls.description: Least privilege per agent � cascade blast radius limited by credential scope

controls.control_id: Shared credentials mean cascade in one agent affects all agents sharing the credential
controls.title: NHI-9 NHI Reuse
controls.description: Unique identity per agent � cascade cannot leverage shared credentials for lateral movement

controls.control_id: Long-lived credentials exposed during cascade remain valid for attacker use post-incident
controls.title: NHI-7 Long-Lived Credentials
controls.description: Short-lived credentials � cascade event triggers automatic revocation of all affected tokens

controls.control_id: Humans using agent credentials � or agents using human credentials � destroys attribution
controls.title: NHI-10 Human Use of NHI
controls.description: Strict separation: agent credentials machine-only, human credentials human-only

controls.control_id: Over-privileged agent identity makes its recommendations appear more authoritative to users
controls.title: NHI-5 Over-Privileged NHI
controls.description: Least privilege makes agent capabilities visible and bounded � users understand what the agent can actually do

controls.control_id: Rogue agent detected but not offboarded � credentials remain valid
controls.title: NHI-1 Improper Offboarding
controls.description: Formal agent offboarding triggered immediately on rogue detection � all credentials revoked

controls.control_id: Rogue agent with excess privilege causes larger blast radius before detection
controls.title: NHI-5 Over-Privileged NHI
controls.description: Least privilege � rogue agent with narrow scope causes less damage before containment

controls.control_id: Long-lived tokens allow rogue agent to operate indefinitely after detection
controls.title: NHI-7 Long-Lived Credentials
controls.description: Short-lived credentials � rogue detection triggers token expiry without requiring manual revocation

controls.control_id: Injection blast radius limited only by credential scope
controls.title: NHI-5 Over-Privileged NHI
controls.description: Apply least-privilege to all data pipeline credentials

controls.control_id: Injected actions can use pipeline tokens for extended period
controls.title: NHI-7 Long-Lived Credentials
controls.description: Short-lived tokens for all data pipeline service accounts

controls.control_id: Write access to training data stores enables poisoning

controls.description: Separate read and write credentials; write requires MFA; Read-only credentials for data consumption; separate write credentials with MFA

controls.description: Vault all training pipeline credentials

controls.control_id: Long-lived write credentials create persistent poisoning window

controls.description: Short-lived write tokens; rotate frequently

controls.description: Scope pipeline credentials to approved data sources only

controls.description: Per-stage credentials with minimum scope
